YouTube Channel Audit

10 dimensions. One brutally honest assessment.

This is the read a $500/hour consultant would give your channel, in about 30 seconds. Most tools stop at a score. We show you why, then hand you one ranked to-do list: traffic, retention, CTR, SEO, and how you stack up against the channels beating you.

Traffic source breakdown. Search vs browse vs external
Competitor benchmarking against channels in your niche
Audience demographics and device profile
Exact priority actions ranked by impact
Run my free audit →

Your first audit is free. No card required.

Fix it →

I'd stared at my own analytics for months with no clue what was wrong. The audit just said it: your intros. I fixed three and watch time finally moved.

Competitive Edge

Find the gaps your competitors leave open.

Point us at any competitor and we map the topics they skip, the title patterns driving their views, and the audience they're leaving underserved. Then we show you how to take that ground before they do.

Topic gap analysis from real video data
Title pattern and keyword extraction
Threat level assessment per competitor
Ready-to-use video ideas from gap analysis
Proof, not a guess

The hooks they won't touch are quietly winning.

These are real videos winning the exact angle your competitor refuses to cover. We surface every one the moment you add a rival, then show you the pattern to copy.

Vaibhav Sisinty

Thumbnail Intelligence

Scored against the videos winning in your niche.

Two passes on every thumbnail. An algorithm checks contrast, text clarity, faces, and composition; a vision model weighs it against the top-performing videos in your exact niche. You get a score out of 100 and a punch list of what to change before you hit publish.

Layer 1. Algorithm, instant, free
Layer 2. AI vision vs real niche benchmarks
Benchmarked by velocity, recency, and channel size bracket
Full history. Every thumbnail scored
Score my thumbnail free →

Layer 1 is free. No card required.

Automated Intelligence

Your channel's weekly performance, in your inbox.

Every Monday, one short report: what moved, your biggest win, what to watch, and the single action worth doing this week. It lands in your inbox and stays in your dashboard, even if you never open the email.

Subscribers, views, retention, channel score
Week-on-week delta on every metric
One priority action per week
Full history in your dashboard
It compounds

One Monday is a nudge. A year of them is a different channel.

Every report ends with one action. They stack up in your dashboard into a record of exactly what moved the needle, week after week.

Week of Mar 17Rewrote weak introsRetention +6%
Week of Mar 24Moved uploads to TuesdayViews +14%
Week of Mar 31Tightened thumbnail textCTR +0.7 pts
Week of Apr 7Leaned into the series+124 subscribers

Best Microphone for YouTube: Every Setup and Budget (2026)

The best microphone for YouTube is the one that fits your setup, not the one with the longest spec sheet. Here are the honest picks for every budget and content type, what top creators really use, and why a good mic grows your channel faster than a better camera.

June 15, 2026 · 13 min read

Growth

Copyright-Free Music for YouTube: The Best Free and Royalty-Free Sources (2026)

The safest free and royalty-free music for YouTube, plus the part most lists skip: how Content ID really works, why "no copyright" tracks from random channels still get claimed, and how to add music to any video without a copyright strike.

June 15, 2026 · 13 min read

Analytics

What Is a Good Click-Through Rate on YouTube? CTR Benchmarks for 2026

A good YouTube CTR is roughly 4 to 10 percent, with most channels averaging 4 to 6. But the honest answer depends on your traffic source, niche, and channel size, and in 2026 a high CTR can hurt you if viewers bounce. Here are the real benchmarks and how to read them.

June 15, 2026 · 12 min read

Frequently asked

Questions answered.

Everything you want to know before you decide. Still unsure? Email us.

01Is YTGrowth worth it when my channel is under 1,000 subscribers?+

Especially then. The smaller your channel, the higher the leverage of a single good decision. Right title, right topic, right timing. You can't afford to guess when you're getting 200 views a video.

02What happens when I run out of AI analyses before my month resets?+

Your features pause until your monthly analyses refill on the 1st, or until you grab a top-up pack. You'll see a warning banner at 80% so you're never surprised mid-sprint.

03How is YTGrowth different from TubeBuddy or VidIQ, exactly?+

TubeBuddy and VidIQ show you dashboards and data. We run the actual AI analysis. Competitor gaps, keyword intent, title variants. And hand you the conclusion, not the raw numbers.

04Can I cancel or change my subscription at any time?+

Yes. Monthly is month-to-month. Cancel whenever. Annual gives you the rest of your year. No cancellation fees, no guilt-trip retention email. Just done.

05Do unused monthly analyses roll over to the following month?+

Monthly included analyses reset every month. Use them or lose them. But top-up pack analyses never expire and never reset. They sit in your account until you need them.

06Can I purchase and use analysis packs without a subscription plan?+

Yes. Packs work standalone. Buy a pack, run analyses, no subscription required. If you have analyses, you have full access. Subscribe later and your pack analyses stack on top.

07Is the lifetime deal truly lifetime, and what happens if you shut down?+

If we shut down, you get a pro-rated refund based on time remaining against a 5-year expected lifespan. We're also small enough that your lifetime deal revenue genuinely helps us stay running. You're part of the bet.

08Can I manage and analyze multiple client channels on the agency plan?+

Yes. Agency supports up to 10 channels (5 on lifetime agency deals) with pooled analyses. You run the analyses, you own the insights, your clients see the results.

Grow on YouTube with data, not guesswork.
